subject: english
learning_objectives: Read and understand a passage on addiction
Identify the role of psychotherapy in helping addicts

sections.heading: Passage
sections.content: The passage is adapted from the Evening Standard. It centres on a psychotherapist named Malcolm Scott and his attempt to help drug addicts. He puts them up in the lonely house where he lives. He and his patients get to know each other pretty well during this time: there are few distractions in the lonely house and the nearest bar is ten kilometers away.
